sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 23

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 23:1
items.html:
(to the question) Gevurot de BON de BON
Ima, plainly, is called BON, but she includes MA and BON, which are Bina and Malchut of Bina of MA. The BON side in her is the lower Hey of Bina of BON, that is, from Gevura downward of Bina of Nekudim. And when it says "Gevurot de BON de BON in Ima," the meaning is: the Gevurot [judgments] that are the BON in Ima, who is herself also called BON. There.
